rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Defendants Nick Lanham, Ed Koster, And Jennifer Komm To Respond To Form Interrogatories, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions

rulings.Case Title: LAURENCE LOCKEY ET AL VS. KAREN HUANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 23, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANTS EDDY CHOY amd MARIA CHOY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. "Parents Plaintiffs" standing is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Or Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend And Judgment For Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 23, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFF KEYHAN MOHANNA's Motion For Reconsideration Or Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend And Judgment For Dismissal DENIED. The Court lacks jurisdiction. Judgment entered on August 11, 2015. This tentative ruling is issued by the honorable Garrett Wong. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: BARNEY DIAMOS VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC. A DELAWARE LIMITED
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 23, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the negligence cause of action alleged against the moving defendant is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of delayed discovery. The Court does not reach other grounds for demurrer to the negligence cause of action at this time. Demurrer is sustained as to the UCL violation cause of action for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element as to at least one prong of this cause of action. Demurrer as to the UCL cause of action is otherwise overruled, standing is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA REILLY VS. JUAN MANUEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; And To Continue Trial Date; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 23, 2015 line 10. DEFENDANT JUAN FRIAS DIOSDADO's MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; And To Continue Trial Date; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to compel further responses to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Responses shall be provided by hand delivery within 3 days of notice of entry of order. Motion to compel further responses to Form Interrogatories and Requests for Admission is DENIED, as not properly before the Court per the Notice of Motion (Notice of Motion 1:19-20 and 1:24-2:1). Sanctions granted in the amount of $500. Trial is continued to October 5, 2015, settlement conference is continued to September 30, 2015. = (501/REQ)
